description: FixMessageParserComponent — parse FIX (Financial Information eXchange) messages.

message_column.label: Message Column
message_column.description: Column holding the raw FIX message (tag=value pairs separated by SOH or `|`).

msg_type_filter.label: Msg Type Filter
msg_type_filter.description: Optional list of MsgType codes to emit. E.g. [D, 8] for orders + executions only. Default: all. Numeric codes like 8 may be passed as ints in YAML — they're coerced to str at runtime.

name: Fix Message Parser
